name: Candied Apples
recipeIngredient: 8 to 10 medium crisp red apples such as Red Delicious, Winesap, Jonathan or McIntosh
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a cookie sheet generously.
2. Wash and dry waxed apples thoroughly.
3. Insert a wooden skewer in the stem end of each apple.
4. Mix sugar, water, corn syrup, and food coloring in a 2-quart heavy saucepan.
5. Heat to boiling over high heat; reduce heat.
6. Boil gently, without stirring, until the temperature reaches 290°F on a candy thermometer or until a small amount of mixture dropped into very cold water separates into threads that are hard but not brittle.
7. Stir in clove oil.
8. Dip apples quickly into the syrup, twirling until completely coated.
9. Place apples on the cookie sheet; cool.
YIELD: 8 to 10 candied apples
